type.name: Object-oriented programming languages
type.description: This type of language treats a program as a group of objects composed of data and program elements, known as attributes and methods.

type.name: Procedural programming languages
type.description: A procedural language follows a sequence of statements or commands in order to achieve a desired output.

type.name: Logic programming languages
